body:
<!-- Thanks so much for your PR, your contribution is appreciated! ❤️ -->

- [x] I have followed (at least) the [PR section of the contributing guide](https://github.com/mui/base-ui/blob/HEAD/CONTRIBUTING.md#sending-a-pull-request).

This lets users replace `<Field.Label>` with a `<div>` to prevent inheriting some unexpected `<label>` behaviors, especially for `<button>` form controls where you want clicks to only focus a control instead of triggering `.click()`, along with avoiding `:hover` on the `<button>` being triggered when hovering the label.

See https://github.com/mui/base-ui/pull/3722
title: [field] Add `nativeLabel` prop to `Label` component
